metadata.description: The display name of the workbook.

content.json:
# AVS Syslog Monitoring Dashboard

This workbook provides visibility into VMware syslog events flowing into the **AVSSyslog** table from your Azure VMware Solution (AVS) private cloud. It is organized into the same two-part structure as the alerting strategy:

- **Part 1** — Severity-based monitoring (Emergency, Alert, Critical, Error)
- **Part 2** — Event-specific monitoring (host failures, VM changes, DNS, firewall, etc.)

---

parameters.name: HostFilter
parameters.query:
AVSSyslog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| distinct HostName
| order by HostName asc
parameters.label: Host

content.query:
AVSSyslog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '{HostFilter}' == 'value::all' or HostName in ({HostFilter})
| where Severity in ("emerg", "alert", "crit", "err")
| summarize Count = count() by Severity
| order by case(
    Severity == "emerg", 0,
    Severity == "alert", 1,
    Severity == "crit", 2,
    Severity == "err", 3,
    99
  ) asc
content.title: High-Impact Events by Severity (0–3 only)

content.query:
AVSSyslog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '{HostFilter}' == 'value::all' or HostName in ({HostFilter})
| summarize Count = count() by Severity
| order by case(
    Severity == "emerg", 0,
    Severity == "alert", 1,
    Severity == "crit", 2,
    Severity == "err", 3,
    Severity == "warning", 4,
    Severity == "notice", 5,
    Severity == "info", 6,
    Severity == "debug", 7,
    99
  ) asc
content.title: Full Severity Distribution (all levels)

content.query:
AVSSyslog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '{HostFilter}' == 'value::all' or HostName in ({HostFilter})
| summarize Count = count() by AppName
| top 15 by Count desc
content.title: Top Event Sources (AppName)

content.json:
---
## Part 1 — Severity-Based Monitoring (emerg / alert / crit / err)

content.query:
AVSSyslog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '{HostFilter}' == 'value::all' or HostName in ({HostFilter})
| where Severity in ("emerg", "alert", "crit", "err")
| summarize Count = count() by Severity, bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain})
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Severity 0–3 Events Over Time

content.query:
AVSSyslog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '{HostFilter}' == 'value::all' or HostName in ({HostFilter})
| where Severity == "emerg"
| project TimeGenerated, HostName, AppName, Facility, Severity, Message
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100
content.title: 🔴 Emergency Events (Severity 0 — emerg)

content.query:
AVSSyslog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '{HostFilter}' == 'value::all' or HostName in ({HostFilter})
| where Severity == "alert"
| project TimeGenerated, HostName, AppName, Facility, Severity, Message
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100
content.title: 🔴 Alert Events (Severity 1 — alert)

content.query:
AVSSyslog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '{HostFilter}' == 'value::all' or HostName in ({HostFilter})
| where Severity == "crit"
| project TimeGenerated, HostName, AppName, Facility, Severity, Message
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100
content.title: 🟠 Critical Events (Severity 2 — crit)

content.query:
AVSSyslog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '{HostFilter}' == 'value::all' or HostName in ({HostFilter})
| where Severity == "err"
| summarize ErrorCount = count() by HostName, AppName, bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain})
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: 🟡 Error Events Over Time by Host + App (Severity 3 — err)

content.query:
AVSSyslog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '{HostFilter}' == 'value::all' or HostName in ({HostFilter})
| where Severity == "err"
| project TimeGenerated, HostName, AppName, Facility, Severity, Message
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 200
content.title: 🟡 Error Events Detail (Severity 3 — err)
Event-Specific Summary

content.query:
AVSSyslog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '{HostFilter}' == 'value::all' or HostName in ({HostFilter})
| where Message has_any ("lost connection to the host", "hostshutdownevent", "hostaddedevent", "hostconnectedevent")
| project TimeGenerated, HostName, AppName, Facility, Severity, Message
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100
content.title: Host Events (connection lost, shutdown, added, connected)

content.query:
AVSSyslog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '{HostFilter}' == 'value::all' or HostName in ({HostFilter})
| where Message has_any ("vmdisconnectedevent", "vmremovedevent", "VmGuestRebootEvent", "VmPowerStateChangedEvent", "vmcreatedevent")
| project TimeGenerated, HostName, AppName, Facility, Severity, Message
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100
content.title: VM Events (disconnected, deleted, rebooted, power change, created)

content.query:
AVSSyslog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '{HostFilter}' == 'value::all' or HostName in ({HostFilter})
| where AppName == "dnsmasq" and Message has "Failed DNS Query"
| summarize FailureCount = count() by HostName, bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain})
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: DNS Failures Over Time

content.query:
AVSSyslog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '{HostFilter}' == 'value::all' or HostName in ({HostFilter})
| where AppName == "FIREWALL" or ProcId == "FIREWALL"
| where Message has_any ("DROP", "REJECT", "denied")
| summarize BlockedCount = count() by HostName, bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain})
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Distributed Firewall Blocked Traffic Over Time

content.query:
AVSSyslog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '{HostFilter}' == 'value::all' or HostName in ({HostFilter})
| where Message has_any ("The host has entered maintenance mode", "The host has exited maintenance mode")
| project TimeGenerated, HostName, AppName, Facility, Severity, Message
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Host Maintenance Mode Changes

content.query:
AVSSyslog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '{HostFilter}' == 'value::all' or HostName in ({HostFilter})
| where Message has "RoleAddedEvent"
| project TimeGenerated, HostName, AppName, Facility, Severity, Message
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Role / Permission Changes (Security Audit)

content.query:
AVSSyslog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '{HostFilter}' == 'value::all' or HostName in ({HostFilter})
| where Severity in ("emerg", "alert", "crit", "err")
| summarize
    emerg = countif(Severity == "emerg"),
    alert = countif(Severity == "alert"),
    crit = countif(Severity == "crit"),
    err = countif(Severity == "err"),
    Total = count()
  by HostName
| order by Total desc
content.title: High-Impact Events per Host (Severity 0–3)

content.query:
AVSSyslog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '{HostFilter}' == 'value::all' or HostName in ({HostFilter})
| where Severity in ("emerg", "alert", "crit", "err")
| summarize Count = count() by HostName, bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain})
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: High-Impact Events per Host Over Time

content.query:
AVSSyslog
| summarize LastEvent = max(TimeGenerated)
| extend MinutesSinceLastEvent = datetime_diff('minute', now(), LastEvent)
| extend Status = iff(MinutesSinceLastEvent > 30, '🔴 NO DATA — Pipeline may be down', iff(MinutesSinceLastEvent > 15, '🟡 DELAYED — Check pipeline', '🟢 HEALTHY'))
| project Status, LastEvent, MinutesSinceLastEvent
content.title: Syslog Ingestion Heartbeat

content.query:
AVSSyslog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize EventCount = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Syslog Ingestion Volume (events per 5 minutes)

content.json:
---
*Workbook source: [Microsoft — Queries for the AVSSyslog table](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/reference/queries/avssyslog) | [AVSSyslog table schema](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/reference/tables/avssyslog)*
